info.name: Ecom Engine - Unified API Collection
info.description: Consolidated Postman collection containing endpoints for Auth, Cart, Catalog, Inventory, Orders, and Payments modules.

request.description: Registers a new user account with a secure password and optional user role.
Authenticates user credentials and generates access and refresh tokens. Saves tokens to the active environment.
Uses a valid refresh token to rotate the session and request a fresh access and refresh token.
Generates a reset token for the specified user email. For testing/dev convenience, the token is returned in the JSON payload.
Completes the password recovery cycle using the generated reset token and a new strong password.
Revokes the active refresh token, immediately logging the user session out.
Retrieves the authenticated user's shopping cart. Requires a valid access token.
Adds a product variant to the authenticated user's cart. Quantity must be greater than zero.
Updates the quantity of a specific variant in the authenticated user's cart. Variant ID is required in the path.
Removes the specified variant from the authenticated user's cart.
Clears all items from the authenticated user's shopping cart.
Retrieves the total number of items in the authenticated user's cart. Lightweight endpoint useful for navbar badges.
Merges a guest cart with the authenticated user's account cart. Use this endpoint on login to combine guest shopping activity with the user account.

item.name: Catalog
item.description: Product catalog and category management services.

request.description: Retrieves products list with optional category, inStock, price range, and search filters.
Alias endpoint for searching products by query parameters.
Retrieves a single product details by its unique identifier.
Creates a new catalog product with its associated variants. Requires authenticated token.
Updates an existing product's fields and variant pricing. Requires authenticated token.
Deletes a product from the catalog by ID. Requires authenticated token.
Lists all configured categories in the system.
Retrieves details of a single category by ID.
Creates a new category. Allows nesting via parent_id. Requires authenticated token.
Updates details of a category. Requires authenticated token.
Deletes a category if it has no active products or child subcategories. Requires authenticated token.
Applies a percentage or fixed discount to the specified product ID. Requires authenticated admin token.
Removes any active discount applied to the specified product ID. Requires authenticated admin token.
Generates a presigned storage upload URL for client-side uploads. Requires admin authorization.
Registers pre-uploaded storage objects into the product's database record. Requires admin authorization.
Flags a specific image as primary for the product catalog display. Requires admin authorization.
Removes a product image resource from database and storage bucket. Requires admin authorization.
Retrieves all customer reviews submitted for the specified product ID. This endpoint is public.
Retrieves the average rating and total review count for the specified product ID. This endpoint is public.
Submits a new customer review for the specified product ID. Requires an authenticated user access token.
Deletes the specified review by its ID. Requires authorization: only the review owner or an admin can delete it.
Retrieves all variants associated with a specific product ID. Publicly accessible.
Adds a new variant to an existing product. Requires authenticated admin/authorized user token.
Updates an existing variant for a product. Requires authenticated admin/authorized user token.
Deletes a variant from a product. A product must retain at least one variant. Requires authenticated admin/authorized user token.
Creates multiple products along with their variants in a single API request. Requires authenticated admin token.
Updates multiple existing products and their variants in a single API request. Requires authenticated admin token.
Deletes multiple products simultaneously by their IDs in a single API request. Requires authenticated admin token.

item.name: Inventory
item.description: Real-time stock management and alerting services.

request.description: Retrieves the audit log of all stock updates, additions, and adjustments made to the specified variant ID across locations. Requires authentication.
Lists all inventory stock items where the quantity is strictly less than or equal to their low-stock threshold. Requires authentication.
Generates a CSV attachment download containing all catalog items, location codes, and stock parameters. Requires authentication.
Places a stock lock reservation on a product variant. Requires authentication.
Releases a locked reservation back into active inventory status. Requires authentication.
Performs an absolute override synchronization for a variant's stock level. Requires authentication.
Moves stock quantities between inventory warehouse locations. Requires authentication.
Adjusts stock up or down for a variant by quantity. Requires authentication.
Updates multiple stock items at once. Requires authentication.
Retrieves stock items list filtered by variant ID, location ID, or status (e.g. low_stock). Requires admin privileges.
Lists all low stock alerts triggered in the system. Requires admin privileges.
Public check of available stock for a product variant at a specific location.
Updates the stock count for a variant at a location. Triggers alerts if drops below threshold. Requires admin privileges.
Configures stock settings for a variant at a location, including low stock thresholds and backorder options. Requires admin privileges.
Removes the stock item mapping for a variant and location. Requires admin privileges.

item.description: Endpoints for authenticated customer order flows.
item.name: User Orders

variable.description: Name of the gateway provider (e.g. stripe, paypal)
